summary: Build a business website for Jo enterprises.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minimal professional wordmark logo, dark text on transparent background (jo-enterprises-logo.dim_512x256.png)
- Abstract business hero banner illustration with neutral modern palette (jo-enterprises-hero.dim_1600x900.png)

existing_features.title: Create a responsive marketing website for “Jo enterprises” with a top navigation and the following sections/pages: Home (hero + value proposition), About, Services, and Contact.
Define and apply a coherent visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, and component style) appropriate for a professional business website, and use it consistently across all pages/sections.
Add a Contact form that collects at minimum: name, email, and message, performs basic client-side validation, and submits the inquiry to the backend for storage.

Add basic footer content for Jo enterprises (business name and a short tagline) and include standard website essentials: readable headings, accessible color contrast, and keyboard-navigable links and form fields.
Add required static image assets (logo and a hero/banner visual) under frontend/public/assets/generated and render them in the site header/hero areas.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a business website for Jo enterprises.
Implement backend data storage for contact inquiries, including a stable data model, an endpoint to create an inquiry, and an endpoint to list inquiries (for future admin use).
